content.en:
Ye Tian is not in a hurry to impact the Ultimate Extreme Venerable Realm now, after all, the Ultimate Extreme Venerable is the last great realm, and once the breakthrough fails, no matter how many clones will die, it is naturally more steady.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian gathered all his relatives together.

After Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue arrived, they saw Ye Tian, and they were all very excited.

"Father!"

"Ancestor!"

Everyone shouted excitedly.

Ye Tian looked at Ye Xingchen and nodded slightly, in the past such a long time, Ye Xingchen's strength was very good, and he even comprehended the ultimate body, reaching the grand standard of the ultimate land.

However, due to the limitations of the Heaven and Earth of the Sea of Dimensions, it was difficult for Ye Xingchen to comprehend the ultimate rule, resulting in his failure to break through to the main realm of the Ancient Ultimate Realm.

Not only did he not break through, but the other Ultimate Realm Lords of the entire Dimensional Sea also did not break through.

For example, the Ultimate Realm Lord like the Extreme Venerable has only reached the Hao level.

Of course, they still haven't chosen to enter the Ultimate Land, if they enter the Ultimate Land, they don't know how the future will be, and if they don't break through the Ultimate Supreme, they won't be able to come back at all.

"Father, have you broken through to the ultimate supreme?"

Ye Xingchen also asked.

"Nope!"

Ye Tian explained briefly.

Ye Xingchen asked again: "Father, will you leave later?"

"Not for the time being!" Ye Tian shook his head, he could completely impact the Ultimate Extreme Venerable Realm in the Sea of Dimensions, there was no need to enter the Ultimate Land again.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian asked Ye Xingchen a lot of things about the Dimensional Sea, he had been away for too long, what was going on here, he didn't know at all, and even the multidimensional territory had changed a lot.

Because the dimensional territories of the multidimensional territory have collapsed, countless fragmented voids have appeared here, and the human race occupies a huge fragmented void.

Even the Void Heaven Palace was gone, he didn't find it, and several Ultimate Realm Masters of the Void Heaven Palace were not here.

"Father, after you left, many wars broke out in the Dimensional Sea, mainly because some treasures were born, causing a large number of Ultimate Realm Lords to fight. And an amazing treasure was also born in the multidimensional realm before, and many foreign Ultimate Realm masters came in, and they didn't care about their father's identity, and they all thought that you couldn't come back. Therefore, in that battle, our human race suffered a lot of losses, and three Ultimate Realm Masters died. Fortunately, my strength is strong enough, and with the help of the Heavenly Extreme Venerable, I survived'~. "

"The Void Heaven Palace did not perish, but after the heavy losses, coupled with the fact that the cultivation environment of the multi-dimensional territory was no longer good, plus the sea of dimensions gave birth to a special heaven and earth, many forces have moved over, and the Void Heaven Palace has also moved over. "

"There is also a branch of our Terran that has moved over, and six Ultimate Realm Lords are guarding there. And I've been staying in the dimensional realm, waiting for my father to return. "

Ye Xingchen reported.

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

This period should be the cultivation explosion period of the Dimension Sea, where a large number of Ultimate Realm Masters were born, and even a number of high-level Ultimate Realm Masters who had been cultivated and refined into the ultimate body were even born.

Suddenly.

Ye Xingchen said again: "Father, although the Heavenly Extreme Venerable has broken through and cultivated into the ultimate body, he has been injured, and it is said that the injury is not light, and he has been staying in the multidimensional territory to heal all these years. "

"He has broken through to the Hao-level Ultimate Realm Lord, and he should be the top Ultimate Realm Lord in the Sea of Dimensions, why would he still be injured like this?"

Ye Tian was very surprised.

Ye Xingchen explained: "Father, after you left, the Sea of Dimensions also gave birth to a very demonic Ultimate Realm Lord, the cultivation speed is extremely fast, it is simply against the sky, and now he is also a high-level Ultimate Realm Lord, and his physical body is very terrifying, he has cultivated at least three ultimate bodies, and it is said that he may be about to comprehend the ultimate rules." "

"This Ultimate Realm Lord is named Guantian Jizun, and he has established the first force of the Dimensional Sea, the Guantian Sacred Mountain! "

Ye Xingchen said.

"Watching the sky and the holy mountain, watching the sky is extremely respectful, interesting!"

Ye Tian also felt that this person was a little against the sky, he was able to grow so fast, he was able to hang up on his own, and what was the situation with this Heaven Viewing Extreme Venerable?

"I'm going to see the Heavenly Venerable!"

Ye Tiandao.

After all, Mitian Jizun had taken care of the human race at the beginning, and now that he was injured, he naturally wanted to take a look.

......

Somewhere in a multidimensional territory.

The Mitian Extreme Venerable was healing here, when suddenly a figure descended, attracting the attention of the Multidimensional Ultimate Realm Lord.

And the Mitian Extreme Venerable also noticed it, and the ultimate will spread over and discovered Ye Tian.

The Mitian Supreme Venerable appeared and said respectfully: "I have seen the Ten Thousand Law Supreme Venerable!"

He was shocked.

Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable Ye Tian actually returned to the Sea of Dimensions, (good) What does this mean?

Could it be that Ye Tian has already achieved the ultimate supreme realm!

If this is really the case, then the human race has been thoroughly developed and has become the ultimate supreme family!

"I've seen the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable!"

Many Ultimate Realm Lords said respectfully.

"Mitian Jizun, the two of us haven't seen each other for a long time, let's talk!"

Ye Tian said.

"Good!"

Mitian Supreme Venerable invited Ye Tian into his palace residence and took out the best tea to entertain Ye Tian.

"Mitian Jizun, listen to my son, are you injured?"

Ye Tian could naturally see the injury of the Heavenly Extreme Venerable, but he still had to ask.

"Yes, I was injured, and I can't recover from my injuries yet. "

Mitian Jizun said helplessly.
